data.body: That's because I *am* indifferent. You then pivoted to  "Israel isn't a victim"...
data.author: did:plc:qxv4kze4sqwhklgrmcrsevam

data.body: ...which is true, but completely off topic. Both posts you were responding to mentioned Diaspora Jews and were in no way about Israel. If you see "Jews" and immediately think "Israel," that's something you need to unlearn ASAP.
data.author: did:plc:qxv4kze4sqwhklgrmcrsevam

data.body: The flip side of "anti-Zionism isn't antisemitism" is "antisemitism isn't anti-Zionism." When you start being an antisemitic dick who views all Jews as extensions of Israel, you support the Zionist narrative that Gentiles can't be trusted to listen to (let alone protect) Diaspora Jews.
data.author: did:plc:qxv4kze4sqwhklgrmcrsevam

data.body: So are you going to insist on being a Zionist tool, or are you going to stop subjecting Diaspora Jews--many of whom have been opposing the occupation longer than you've been aware it existed--to Pavlovian antisemitism every time the word "Jewish" is mentioned?

data.body:
Main reasons for sticking with substack:
-Need a free options for blogging and/or newsletters
-Said free option can NOT involve the user having to even THINK about what the hell is server vs. client
-Ability to reach out and connect with others.

data.body: This is the closest I can find via activitypub, though the free tier is no longer available. THe monthly hosting is cheaper than Ghost though it should be noted that Ghost is technically a "headless content management system" which is definitely gonna mess up searches.
